basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bilaspur Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 79 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bilaspur Himachal Pradesh
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bilaspur Himachal Pradesh (AIIMS Bilaspur) Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Notification 2026 has been released on 30 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Bilaspur. A total of 79 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Bilaspur Senior Resident (Non-Academic) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: A medical qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part II of the third schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956. Must be registered with the Central/State Medical Council. A postgraduate degree i.e., MD/MS/DNB as per MCI rule in the specialty concerned or its equivalent from a recognized University/Institute.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Bilaspur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts at AIIMS Bilaspur is scheduled to be held on 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Resident posts at AIIMS Bilaspur?
faq.answer: There are a total of 79 vacancies for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) positions at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bilaspur Himachal Pradesh. These vacancies are spread across various medical specialties.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a medical qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part II of the third schedule of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956, be registered with a Medical Council, and hold a postgraduate degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the concerned specialty.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts is 45 years. Age relaxation rules as per government norms may apply.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident (Non-Academic) posts will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 67,700, which is as per Level-11 of the pay matrix, plus NPA.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the AIIMS Bilaspur Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted through a Walk-in Interview. Interested and eligible candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the AIIMS Bilaspur Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC candidates is Rs. 1000 + GST (18%) = 1180. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bilaspur, Himachal Pradesh, located at Bilaspur, Pincode: 174037. Specific details about the venue within AIIMS Bilaspur will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, registration certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any relaxation in the age limit for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories as per the prevailing government rules and regulations. Specific details will be available in the official notification.
